Senior Product Manager

Test Co · Remote · United States

About Test Co: We're building tools for product managers to ship faster.

You will: own the roadmap for our core platform; partner with engineering and design; talk to customers weekly; ship outcomes, not features.

You bring: 5+ years of PM experience, including at least 2 years on a B2B SaaS product. Strong written communication. Comfort with data.

We offer: 18 weeks of paid parental leave, 4 weeks of vacation, comprehensive healthcare, $2,000/year learning budget.

Personal Information
Resume / CV
Online Presence
Additional Questions
Voluntary Self-Identification
